context: Tests whether the agent correctly persists the guest cart token in an httpOnly cookie (not localStorage), uses correct cookie settings, implements optimistic UI for add-to-cart with proper revert-on-failure, and uses the React useReducer/context pattern for cart state.

checklist.name: httpOnly cookie (not localStorage)
checklist.description: Guest cart token is stored using an httpOnly cookie, NOT in localStorage or sessionStorage

checklist.name: Cookie named cart_token
checklist.description: The guest cart cookie is named 'cart_token'

checklist.name: Cookie secure flag
checklist.description: Cookie is set with secure: true (or secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') to ensure HTTPS-only in production

checklist.name: Cookie maxAge 30 days
checklist.description: Cookie maxAge is set to 30 days (2592000000 ms or 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)

checklist.name: UUID guest token
checklist.description: Guest token is generated as a UUID (using uuid library, crypto.randomUUID, or similar)

checklist.name: Optimistic add dispatch
checklist.description: addItem dispatches an optimistic state update to the cart BEFORE awaiting the API response

checklist.name: Revert on API failure
checklist.description: On API call failure in addItem, the cart state is reverted by re-fetching the current cart from the server

checklist.name: useReducer for cart state
checklist.description: Cart state is managed with useReducer (not useState) with a cartReducer function

checklist.name: CartContext and useCart hook
checklist.description: A CartContext is created and a useCart hook exported that calls useContext(CartContext)

checklist.name: DESIGN_NOTES mentions httpOnly rationale
checklist.description: DESIGN_NOTES.md mentions that httpOnly cookie was chosen over localStorage for security (XSS protection)

checklist.name: DESIGN_NOTES mentions optimistic UI
checklist.description: DESIGN_NOTES.md mentions the optimistic update strategy (update immediately, revert on failure)
